0.text: Widespread varicose bronchiectasis in both lungs

1.text: Bronchiectasis with bronchial thickening in the lateral basal segment of the right lower lobe

2.text: Bronchiectasis with bronchial thickening in the apicoposterior segment of the left upper lobe

3.text: Bronchiectasis with bronchial thickening in the anterior segment of the right upper lobe

4.text: Varicose bronchiectasis in the lateral basal segment of the right lower lobe

5.text: Intense peribronchial thickening in the lateral basal segment of the right lower lobe

6.text: Bud branch appearances in the lateral basal segment of the right lower lobe

7.text: Infected bronchiectasis in the lateral basal segment of the right lower lobe

8.text: Mosaic attenuation due to diffuse aeration differences in both lungs
